_comment: TEST VECTOR ONLY — not a real key. Pinned mnemonic → master Ed25519 keypair derivation per F7.3.1. Asserts BIP-39 PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA512(2048) followed by HKDF-SHA256(salt=utf8('yawp-master-v1'), info=utf8('ed25519-seed'), L=32) produces the same 32-byte Ed25519 seed and DID across Elixir and TypeScript. Never use this seed for any live identity.
mnemonic: abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon about
